what_happened.phase_1_pwa_audit: Started as L5 Overseer for MindShift PWA. Audited 5 Antigravity commits (A→E), all APPROVED. Found gitignore blocking native resources, React Router version mismatch.
what_happened.phase_2_pivot: CEO said 'мы строим mindshift academy курс для детей' — realized entire session was on wrong project. Pivoted to Academy.
what_happened.phase_3_academy_build: Built: onboarding page, webhook→DB, retention engine logic, CRON endpoints, email template, AI provider (NVIDIA), Clerk auth middleware. All verified: tsc 0 errors, build 0 errors.
what_happened.phase_4_honest_audit: Rated Academy 5.3/10 vs world-class. Monster=emoji, zero sound, zero animations. CEO appreciated honesty.
what_happened.phase_5_plan: Wrote 8-sprint plan, had 3 agents critique it (feasibility/technical/product-market). 15/24 points changed. Pricing 29→14.90 AZN, shame-free redesign, monster-first sprint order.
what_happened.phase_6_security: Fixed 6 critical gaps: demo bypass, XP farming, COPPA, output moderation, reset endpoint, auth helper.
what_happened.phase_7_atlas_pivot: CEO said 'атлас нужен'. Deep-audited ANUS (10.5K LOC, 156 tests), VOLAURA swarm (16.3K LOC), Atlas workspace (signal+action engines). Found ZEUS = live Supabase schema (not dead).
what_happened.phase_8_ecosystem_sync: Wrote handoff (279 lines) + deep audit (300 lines). Sent 7-task audit prompt to 3 agents. All returned. Self-Wake fixed (was gitignore conflict). ANUS committed (78→0 dirty).
what_happened.phase_9_maps: 3 search agents returned MAP-A (identity/voice/emotion, 327 lines), MAP-B (zeus/governance/swarm, 747 lines), MAP-C (anus/operator/brain, 832 lines). Total: 1,906 lines of ecosystem truth.
